examples: You can cook a cheap veggie chilli in 15 minutes.
If you prefer mild flavours reduce or leave out the chilli.
You can taste the green chilli in the dish but it is a little sweet.
Try the garlic and chilli prawns cooked a la plancha (grilled on a metal plate).
The roof garden grows everything from aubergines, tomatoes and chilli peppers to herbs and watermelons.
